exampleSentencesTranslated: I left the keys on the table but now they disappeared.
The shirt I just bought yesterday also disappeared.
Her phone was in her bag but suddenly it disappeared.
exampleSentences: Em để chìa khóa ở bàn mà giờ mất tiêu rồi.
Cái áo anh mới mua hôm qua cũng mất tiêu luôn.
Điện thoại của chị để trong túi mà tự nhiên mất tiêu.
notes:
mất tiêu = totally disappeared, gone just like that. It often implies surprise, annoyance, or “how did that even happen?”

It’s an informal verb phrase, used when something is suddenly not there anymore. Often used for small objects, money, time, or even people in casual talk.

Very close to biến mất, but mất tiêu feels more casual and expressive, like “poof, gone.”
